member.summary: Output Dto used to return minimal order data.

member.summary: Abstract DTO used to return OrderItem abstract type data.

member.summary: Query data transfer object used to search orders.

member.summary: Extension methods for OrdersQuery type.

member.summary: Data transfer object representing an order tax entry.

member.summary: Maps order tax entries between domain and dto objects.

member.summary: Data transfer object used to return complete payable orders information.

member.summary: Data transfer object used to return payable order items.

member.summary: Provides data read and write methods for order and order item instances.

member.summary: Holds information about an expense category including its operating rules.

member.name: T:Empiria.Orders.Order
member.summary: Represents an abstract order.

member.summary: Provides mapping methods from order and order items to budgetable interfaces.

member.name: T:Empiria.Orders.OrderCategory
member.summary: Represents an order category which holds orders of the same kind or order type.

member.summary: Abstract partitioned type that represents an order item.

member.summary: Abstract DTO fields structure used for update order items information.

member.summary: Collection of taxes for an order.

member.summary: Power type that describes an order item.

member.summary: Provides services to control order's rules.

member.summary: Represents a tax applied to an order.

member.summary: Input fields used to add or update an order tax entry.

member.summary: Collection of taxes for an order.

member.summary: Power type that describes an order.
